summary:
GLOBAL CONFLICTS AND SEISMIC ACTIVITY: Brandon recounts recent news confirming his previous warnings, specifically mentioning a major earthquake in Alaska and an Israeli attack on Damascus, Syria. He warns of future biological weapons emerging from Syria to attack Israel, alongside a potential ground invasion by Turkey. Brandon also discusses seismic threats along the Ring of Fire, noting that recent tremors might be relieving pressure on a massive, mile-wide volcano off the coast of Oregon. He recalls a past vision of Yellowstone National Park covered by a golden tarp that is currently being unstitched, suggesting an escalation of volcanic activity near Seattle and Oregon that could trigger devastating tsunamis if not mitigated by continuous intercession.

DOMESTIC THREATS AND POLITICAL WARNINGS: Brandon highlights a recent incident involving a white van in New York City carrying illegal amounts of combustible fuel, connecting it to a past vision he had of a white van carrying large drums of fertilizer. He cautions about a potential Red Dawn scenario and a 9/11-style event threatening America in the late summer and September months. Emphasizing the importance of spiritual warfare, Brandon foresees significant political shifts, including a dark cloud over New York tied to a mayoral election that will cause mass migration away from the East Coast. He also describes a vision of thick, granite-like concrete walls being erected along the Texas-Mexico border extending toward Louisiana, signaling preparations for upcoming tribulations.

ECONOMIC ILLUSIONS AND FINANCIAL SHIFTS: Brandon describes visions of a manipulated economy, heavily emphasizing themes of artificial inflation and fake prosperity around November and Black Friday. He visualizes a golden road made of corn kernels where a brainless scarecrow dances, symbolizing economic illusions. Brandon sees Donald Trump with cartoonish makeup parading a pig with lipstick, representing a deceptive presentation of housing markets and interest rates. Additionally, Brandon predicts a massive, rapid spiritual wealth transfer tied to the release of cryptocurrency and rulings by Judge Torres. He warns people to ride the wave of shallow, transparent financial surges involving money, gold, and oil derricks, cautioning that this wave will soon crash during the winter months.

CORRUPTION AND FOREIGN INFLUENCE: Brandon shares visions of deep-seated government corruption, specifically seeing the face of Jeffrey Epstein and describing frantic efforts by politicians in Washington, Europe, and Asia to hide embarrassing blackmail material. He compares these corrupt officials to scurrying rats and roaches on a burning ship. Furthermore, Brandon sees the word China written across American farmlands in Kansas and Nebraska, accompanied by bending wheat and dirt fields tilled by John Deere tractors. He notes that Elon Musk, whom he sees riding a Tesla and sweating while wearing a hat hinting at a new political party, will align with Trump to challenge these foreign land grabs in America.

SPIRITUAL AWAKENING AND DIVINE ANCHORS: Brandon witnesses a profound spiritual revival originating in the central United States, visualizing massive, glowing golden chains extending from regions like Missouri, Tulsa, Branson, and Kansas City straight into the heavens. He describes a massive outpouring of the Holy Spirit hitting public schools, college campuses, and small country churches, where he sees individual flames of fire resting on wooden pews. Brandon emphasizes the arrival of many spiritual babies, depicted as infants in bonnets and cloth diapers waiting outside these churches. He stresses the need for patience and loving guidance from experienced believers to teach and nurture this massive influx of newly born-again individuals during the coming harvest.
rawData: [July 18, 2025]-[Today’s prayer was over the top - what’s coming – do not miss this]-[https://youtu.be/qkyOlKNbbRM]-[Hey, good morning, family. Praise the Lord.
